visual: Balances on the left leg and extends the right leg forward with the heel leading, arms opening outward in a cross-hands-to-wide-arms motion.
motion_description: Balancing entirely on a slightly bent left leg, the practitioner lifts the right knee toward the chest while crossing the forearms in front of the sternum. Maintaining a stable torso, the right leg then extends forward in a steady, deliberate motion, leading with the heel until it is fully straight. Simultaneously, the crossed arms separate and extend outward to the sides at shoulder height, with palms facing away from the body. The posture is briefly held before the right knee bends back toward the chest and the arms lower to waist level.
